knowledge_gaps.description: Recorded limitation worth testing: limited longitudinal validation
knowledge_gaps.suggested_research_path: Formulate a hypothesis that directly attacks the documented limitation and verify it under stress conditions.
knowledge_gaps.value_argument: The gap is grounded in an author-reported limitation, so it has stronger evidential support than a bare untried combination.

knowledge_gaps.description: Method 'graph neural network' is only recorded in scenario 'tumor microenvironment', but may be transferable to scenario 'clonal evolution'.
knowledge_gaps.suggested_research_path: Audit assumptions of the source scenario, then run a small transfer validation in the target scenario.
knowledge_gaps.value_argument: Migration gaps can create useful cross-domain leverage if mechanism assumptions remain valid.
knowledge_gaps.assessment_reason: refs=1, gap_type=migration, strongest_local_overlap=0.357, coverage=0.55, feasibility=medium, application_value=medium

knowledge_gaps.description: Method 'graph neural network' has no recorded validation in scenario 'clonal evolution' in the current PaperGraph map.

hypotheses.statement: If graph neural network is applied to clonal evolution under explicit failure-mode stress tests, then gene expression will improve or reveal a falsifiable boundary condition. The decisive test is constrained to prediction accuracy under an explicit stress regime.
hypotheses.mechanism: The proposed mechanism is that graph neural network changes the information, intervention, or representation pathway in clonal evolution; because the source gap indicates weak evidence, testing gene expression can distinguish a real mechanism from a pseudo-gap.
hypotheses.expected_value: The combination may expose method-scenario boundary conditions rather than simply adding another benchmark.
hypotheses.test_plan: Build a minimal benchmark for clonal evolution; compare graph neural network against canonical baselines; measure gene expression; include negative controls, ablations, and failure-mode analysis. Add a preregistered stress test for prediction accuracy.
hypotheses.competition_advantage: Ranks well because it is traceable to a high-value gap, has an explicit mechanism, and includes falsifiable validation criteria.

verification_plan.falsification_condition: No improvement or mechanistic separation on gene expression under the stated condition.
